channel.title: macos on Haoran Blog
channel.description: Recent content in macos on Haoran Blog

item.title: 如何优雅地操作macOS?
item.description: mac 终端变慢 sudo rm -f /private/var/log/asl/\*.asl 如何让Finder显示隐藏文件和文件夹 # 显示 defaults write com.apple.finder AppleShowAllFiles -boolean true ; killall Finder # 隐藏 defaults write com.apple.finder AppleShowAllFiles -boolean false ; killall Finder https://sspai.com/post/26273 brew安装指定版本的软件 https://blog.csdn.net/aa464971/article/details/84860937 https://segmentfault.com/a/1190000015346120 删除
